title: Eugene's Lance
body:
This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!

---
### install along with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) for the best experience.

Ever want to fight like a medieval knight? Try this.

Ride on your horse, hold the lance, and charge! When you hit your enemy, they will be knocked back for meters. This can even works with knockback enchantment!

**Here is an interesting and realistic mechanic: the knockback distance equals to the distance when you hit the target. So, try to master the timing!**

If your enemy is also riding, they will be knocked down the horse. this means you can play jousting with your friend!

Speical thanks to [Heket_White](https://space.bilibili.com/1754762250) for the technical support!
